• Canvas‑based Matrix rain with customizable colors, speed, and character set via URL parameters.
  • Responsive resizing and optional horizontal/vertical travel adjustments.
  • Displays optional evaluated JavaScript text in the bottom‑left corner.
    canvas.width = width * scale;
    setInterval(drawFrame, 1000 / framerate);

This page renders a programmable Matrix effect that adapts to screen size and device pixel ratio. Parameters like color, speed, letters, and custom JavaScript text are read from the query string. Visibility changes pause the animation to conserve resources.
